caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap speaks into a professional black microphone. His shirt features the bold white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with several framed photos on the wall behind him and a white mannequin dressed in a white shirt to his right. In the background, racks of colorful clothing are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red text logo on the right that reads "REALLY HOT". As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk, with slight changes in his facial expression and mouth movements, while the camera remains static, keeping him centered in the shot.
